question: Write a game of Tetris for three players who are playing in collaboration. The implementation should include all necessary classes, as well as code responsible for rendering the graphic user interface. The code should also include necessary mechanics to allow three players to play, keep separate scores, and to determine the contributions of each player to the overall score in a fair manner.

import tkinter as tk
from random import randint

class Player:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self.score = 0

class Game:
    def __init__(self):
        self.players = []
        self.current_player = 0

    def add_player(self, player):
        self.players.append(player)

    def next_player(self):
        self.current_player = (self.current_player + 1) % len(self.players)

    def roll_dice(self):
        return randint(1, 6)

class GUI:
    def __init__(self, game):
        self.game = game
        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("Cockab9ratioM")
        self.player_label = tk.Label(self.root, text="Player 1")
        self.player_label.pack()
        self.score_label = tk.Label(self.root, text="Score: 0")
        self.score_label.pack()
        self.roll_button = tk.Button(self.root, text="Roll", command=self.roll)
        self.roll_button.pack()
        self.next_button = tk.Button(self.root, text="Next Player", command=self.next_player)
        self.next_button.pack()
        self.scoreboard_label = tk.Label(self.root, text="Scoreboard:")
        self.scoreboard_label.pack()
        self.scoreboard_text = tk.Text(self.root, height=10, width=20)
        self.scoreboard_text.pack()

    def roll(self):
        roll = self.game.roll_dice()
        self.game.players[self.game.current_player].score += roll
        self.score_label['text'] = f"Score: {self.game.players[self.game.current_player].score}"
        self.scoreboard_text.insert(tk.END, f"{self.game.players[self.game.current_player].name} rolled a {roll}\n")

    def next_player(self):
        self.game.next_player()
        self.player_label['text'] = f"Player {self.game.current_player + 1}"
        self.score_label['text'] = f"Score: {self.game.players[self.game.current_player].score}"
        self.scoreboard_text.insert(tk.END, f"\n{self.game.players[self.game.current_player].name}'s turn\n")

    def update_scoreboard(self):
        self.scoreboard_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
        for i, player in enumerate(self.game.players):
            self.scoreboard_text.insert(tk.END, f"{i+1}. {player.name}: {player.score}\n")

    def run(self):
        self.update_scoreboard()
        self.root.mainloop()

def main():
    game = Game()
    game.add_player(Player("Player 1"))
    game.add_player(Player("Player 2"))
    game.add_player(Player("Player 3"))
    gui = GUI(game)
    gui.run()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import tkinter as tk
from random import randint

class Player:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self.score = 0

class Game:
    def __init__(self):
        self.players = []
        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("Cooperation Game")
        self.entry_frame = tk.Frame(self.root)
        self.entry_frame.pack()
        self.name_labels = []
        self.name_entries = []
        for i in range(3):
            label = tk.Label(self.entry_frame, text=f"Player {i+1} Name:")
            label.pack(side=tk.LEFT)
            entry = tk.Entry(self.entry_frame)
            entry.pack(side=tk.LEFT)
            self.name_labels.append(label)
            self.name_entries.append(entry)
        self.start_button = tk.Button(self.entry_frame, text="Start Game", command=self.start_game)
        self.start_button.pack(side=tk.LEFT)

    def start_game(self):
        for entry in self.name_entries:
            self.players.append(Player(entry.get()))
        self.entry_frame.pack_forget()
        self.game_frame = tk.Frame(self.root)
        self.game_frame.pack()
        self.score_labels = []
        for i, player in enumerate(self.players):
            label = tk.Label(self.game_frame, text=f"{player.name}'s Score: {player.score}")
            label.pack()
            self.score_labels.append(label)
        self.contribution_labels = []
        for i, player in enumerate(self.players):
            label = tk.Label(self.game_frame, text=f"{player.name}'s Contribution: 0")
            label.pack()
            self.contribution_labels.append(label)
        self.total_score_label = tk.Label(self.game_frame, text="Total Score: 0")
        self.total_score_label.pack()
        self.roll_button = tk.Button(self.game_frame, text="Roll Dice", command=self.roll_dice)
        self.roll_button.pack()

    def roll_dice(self):
        total = 0
        contributions = []
        for _ in range(3):
            roll = randint(1, 6)
            total += roll
            contributions.append(roll)
        for i, player in enumerate(self.players):
            player.score += contributions[i]
            self.score_labels[i]['text'] = f"{player.name}'s Score: {player.score}"
            self.contribution_labels[i]['text'] = f"{player.name}'s Contribution: {contributions[i]}"
        self.total_score_label['text'] = f"Total Score: {total}"

    def run(self):
        self.root.mainloop()

game = Game()
game.run()

import tkinter as tk
from random import randint, choice

class Player:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self.score = 0

class Game:
    def __init__(self):
        self.players = []
        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("Cockab9ratioM")
        self.entry_frame = tk.Frame(self.root)
        self.entry_frame.pack()
        self.name_label = tk.Label(self.entry_frame, text="Enter player name:")
        self.name_label.pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        self.name_entry = tk.Entry(self.entry_frame)
        self.name_entry.pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        self.add_button = tk.Button(self.entry_frame, text="Add player", command=self.add_player)
        self.add_button.pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        self.start_button = tk.Button(self.entry_frame, text="Start game", command=self.start_game)
        self.start_button.pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        self.game_frame = tk.Frame(self.root)
        self.score_labels = []
        self.contribution_labels = []

    def add_player(self):
        name = self.name_entry.get()
        if name:
            self.players.append(Player(name))
            self.name_entry.delete(0, tk.END)
            self.update_player_list()

    def update_player_list(self):
        for widget in self.game_frame.winfo_children():
            widget.destroy()
        self.score_labels = []
        self.contribution_labels = []
        for i, player in enumerate(self.players):
            label = tk.Label(self.game_frame, text=player.name)
            label.pack()
            score_label = tk.Label(self.game_frame, text="Score: 0")
            score_label.pack()
            self.score_labels.append(score_label)
            contribution_label = tk.Label(self.game_frame, text="Contribution: 0")
            contribution_label.pack()
            self.contribution_labels.append(contribution_label)

    def start_game(self):
        self.entry_frame.pack_forget()
        self.game_frame.pack()
        self.game_loop()

    def game_loop(self):
        if len(self.players) < 3:
            return
        for i in range(3):
            player = choice(self.players)
            player.score += randint(1, 10)
        self.update_scores()
        self.root.after(1000, self.game_loop)

    def update_scores(self):
        total_score = sum(player.score for player in self.players)
        for i, player in enumerate(self.players):
            self.score_labels[i]['text'] = f"Score: {player.score}"
            self.contribution_labels[i]['text'] = f"Contribution: {(player.score / total_score) * 100:.2f}%"

    def run(self):
        self.root.mainloop()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    game = Game()
    game.run()

import tkinter as tk
from random import randint

class Player:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self.score = 0

class Game:
    def __init__(self):
        self.players = [Player("Player 1"), Player("Player 2"), Player("Player 3")]
        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("Collaboration Game")
        self.labels = []
        self.entries = []
        self.scores = []

        for i in range(3):
            label = tk.Label(self.root, text=self.players[i].name)
            label.grid(row=i, column=0)
            self.labels.append(label)

            entry = tk.Entry(self.root)
            entry.grid(row=i, column=1)
            self.entries.append(entry)

            score = tk.Label(self.root, text="Score: 0")
            score.grid(row=i, column=2)
            self.scores.append(score)

        submit_button = tk.Button(self.root, text="Submit", command=self.submit_scores)
        submit_button.grid(row=3, column=1)

        self.contribution_labels = []
        for i in range(3):
            label = tk.Label(self.root, text="Contribution: 0")
            label.grid(row=i, column=3)
            self.contribution_labels.append(label)

    def submit_scores(self):
        for i in range(3):
            try:
                score = int(self.entries[i].get())
                self.players[i].score += score
                self.scores[i].config(text=f"Score: {self.players[i].score}")
            except ValueError:
                pass

        total_score = sum(player.score for player in self.players)
        for i in range(3):
            contribution = (self.players[i].score / total_score) * 100 if total_score > 0 else 0
            self.contribution_labels[i].config(text=f"Contribution: {contribution:.2f}%")

    def run(self):
        self.root.mainloop()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    game = Game()
    game.run()
0.4:
class Player:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self.score = 0
        self.contribution = 0

class Team:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self.players = []
        self.score = 0

    def add_player(self, player):
        self.players.append(player)

    def calculate_score(self):
        self.score = sum(player.score for player in self.players)

    def calculate_contributions(self):
        total_score = self.score
        for player in self.players:
            player.contribution = (player.score / total_score) * 100 if total_score!= 0 else 0

class Game:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self.teams = []

    def add_team(self, team):
        self.teams.append(team)

    def play(self):
        for team in self.teams:
            team.calculate_score()
            team.calculate_contributions()
            print(f"Team {team.name} score: {team.score}")
            for player in team.players:
                print(f"Player {player.name} score: {player.score}, contribution: {player.contribution}%")

    def keep_records(self):
        for team in self.teams:
            print(f"Team {team.name} records:")
            for player in team.players:
                print(f"Player {player.name} score: {player.score}, contribution: {player.contribution}%")

def main():
    game = Game("TTFee")
    team1 = Team("Team 1")
    team2 = Team("Team 2")
    team3 = Team("Team 3")

    player1 = Player("Player 1")
    player1.score = 100
    player2 = Player("Player 2")
    player2.score = 200
    player3 = Player("Player 3")
    player3.score = 300
    player4 = Player("Player 4")
    player4.score = 400
    player5 = Player("Player 5")
    player5.score = 500
    player6 = Player("Player 6")
    player6.score = 600

    team1.add_player(player1)
    team1.add_player(player2)
    team2.add_player(player3)
    team2.add_player(player4)
    team3.add_player(player5)
    team3.add_player(player6)

    game.add_team(team1)
    game.add_team(team2)
    game.add_team(team3)

    game.play()
    game.keep_records()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

class FootballPlayer:
    def __init__(self, name, position, team):
        self.name = name
        self.position = position
        self.team = team
        self.goals = 0
        self.assists = 0

    def score_goal(self):
        self.goals += 1

    def make_assist(self):
        self.assists += 1

    def display_stats(self):
        print(f"Name: {self.name}")
        print(f"Position: {self.position}")
        print(f"Team: {self.team}")
        print(f"Goals: {self.goals}")
        print(f"Assists: {self.assists}")


class FootballTeam:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self.players = []

    def add_player(self, player):
        self.players.append(player)

    def display_roster(self):
        for player in self.players:
            player.display_stats()
            print("--------------------")


class League:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self.teams = []

    def add_team(self, team):
        self.teams.append(team)

    def display_standings(self):
        for team in self.teams:
            print(f"Team: {team.name}")
            team.display_roster()

def calculate_total_cost(price, quantity):
    total_cost = price * quantity
    return total_cost

def calculate_discount(total_cost, discount_percentage):
    discount_amount = (discount_percentage / 100) * total_cost
    return discount_amount

def calculate_final_cost(total_cost, discount_amount):
    final_cost = total_cost - discount_amount
    return final_cost

def main():
    price = 100
    quantity = 5
    discount_percentage = 10

    total_cost = calculate_total_cost(price, quantity)
    discount_amount = calculate_discount(total_cost, discount_percentage)
    final_cost = calculate_final_cost(total_cost, discount_amount)

    print("Total Cost: ", total_cost)
    print("Discount Amount: ", discount_amount)
    print("Final Cost: ", final_cost)

main()

def calculate_shipping_cost(weight, distance):
    base_cost = 10
    weight_cost = weight * 0.5
    distance_cost = distance * 0.1
    total_shipping_cost = base_cost + weight_cost + distance_cost
    return total_shipping_cost

def calculate_total_price(price, quantity, discount, weight, distance):
    total_cost = calculate_total_cost(price, quantity, discount)
    shipping_cost = calculate_shipping_cost(weight, distance)
    total_price = total_cost + shipping_cost
    return total_price

def calculate_discount(price, discount_percentage):
    discount_amount = price * (discount_percentage / 100)
    return price - discount_amount

def generate_invoice(customer_name, product_name, quantity, price, discount_percentage):
    subtotal = quantity * price
    discount_amount = calculate_discount(subtotal, discount_percentage)
    total = subtotal - discount_amount
    tax_rate = 0.08
    tax_amount = total * tax_rate
    total_with_tax = total + tax_amount
    invoice = f"Invoice for {customer_name}\nProduct: {product_name}\nQuantity: {quantity}\nPrice: ${price:.2f}\nDiscount: {discount_percentage}%\nSubtotal: ${subtotal:.2f}\nDiscount Amount: ${discount_amount:.2f}\nTotal: ${total:.2f}\nTax ({tax_rate*100}%): ${tax_amount:.2f}\nTotal with Tax: ${total_with_tax:.2f}"
    return invoice

discount_percentage = float(input("Enter discount percentage (%): "))

print(invoice)

def calculate_rbe(rbe_values, spa_values, teal_values):
    rbe_result = []
    for rbe, spa, teal in zip(rbe_values, spa_values, teal_values):
        rbe_result.append(rbe * spa * teal)
    return rbe_result

def filter_rbe(rbe_values, threshold):
    return [rbe for rbe in rbe_values if rbe > threshold]

def main():
    rbe_values = [1.2, 3.4, 5.6]
    spa_values = [7.8, 9.0, 1.2]
    teal_values = [3.4, 5.6, 7.8]
    threshold = 20.0

    rbe_result = calculate_rbe(rbe_values, spa_values, teal_values)
    filtered_rbe = filter_rbe(rbe_result, threshold)

    print("RBE Result:", rbe_result)
    print("Filtered RBE:", filtered_rbe)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

def calculate_raks(gb43, isjw, do_paf):
    raks = []
    for i in range(len(gb43)):
        if isjw[i] > 0 and do_paf[i] > 0:
            raks.append(gb43[i] * isjw[i] * do_paf[i])
    return raks

def filter_raks(raks, threshold):
    return [rak for rak in raks if rak > threshold]

def main():
    gb43 = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
    isjw = [6, 7, 8, 9, 10]
    do_paf = [11, 12, 13, 14, 15]
    threshold = 1000
    raks = calculate_raks(gb43, isjw, do_paf)
    filtered_raks = filter_raks(raks, threshold)
    print(filtered_raks)

main()

            raks.append(i * isjw_percent * do_paf_value)
        else:
            raks.append(i)
    return raks

def find_raks_of_g4h4ld(isjw, gb43):
    result = []
    for raks in gb43:
        if isjw.get(raks) == "Do:paf(3QG&pn":
            result.append(raks)
    return result

def calculate_twmf4eljb(vfxobkf, tc4t):
    return vfxobkf * tc4t

def filter_bdv3cxs5u(xprd, xckw, ogvkxrxr):
    return [item for item in xprd if item['w,c8'] == xckw and item['OGVk*XR'] == ogvkxrxr]

def rak_function(isjw, gb43, vfxobkf, tc4t, xprd, xckw, ogvkxrxr):
    raks = find_raks_of_g4h4ld(isjw, gb43)
    twmf4eljb = calculate_twmf4eljb(vfxobkf, tc4t)
    filtered_xprd = filter_bdv3cxs5u(xprd, xckw, ogvkxrxr)
    return raks, twmf4eljb, filtered_xprd

isjw = {
    "RAK1": "Do:paf(3QG&pn",
    "RAK2": "Not Do:paf(3QG&pn",
    "RAK3": "Do:paf(3QG&pn"
}

gb43 = ["RAK1", "RAK2", "RAK3"]

vfxobkf = 10
tc4t = 2

xprd = [
    {'w,c8': 'OGV1', 'OGVk*XR': 'JSV1'},
    {'w,c8': 'OGV2', 'OGVk*XR': 'JSV2'},
    {'w,c8': 'OGV1', 'OGVk*XR': 'JSV1'}
]

xckw = 'OGV1'
ogvkxrxr = 'JSV1'

raks, twmf4eljb, filtered_xprd = rak_function(isjw, gb43, vfxobkf, tc4t, xprd, xckw, ogvkxrxr)
print(raks)
print(twmf4eljb)
print(filtered_xprd)
